creator: rodrigo@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Xavier,

can you provide - without disclosing clients data -
in this ticket or by private email more details
about the issues found using rpm4 in a way I can
validate your analysis or better reproduce the
issue.

BTW, the patch looks good to me, I just add update
CONFLICTS_INSTALL with the two packages flavors
to block install of both flavors as described in
porter handbook[1]

Cheers,
-- rodrigo

[1] https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/book/#conflicts
